## [00:00 - 03:02]

Basic building block number nine, stay broke. Stay broke. Now some of you are doing this without trying. When you start looking at your income, start focusing on that. Start working, sitting down, looking at your finances every week. Start using debt, debt and credit for the right things, not the wrong things. You start taking your income and you bring it up at increments. Remember that one? Bring up that income in increments. What I want you to do now is every time you go in increments, you go from 10 grand to 15 grand. How much of that are you going to save? 40% of the 15 grand, you save 6,000 before you paid any taxes, before you paid your rent, your car payments or groceries. I want you to take that 6 grand. This is what I want you to do with it. This is the holy grail of wealth building right here. I want you to take that 6 grand and I want you to go broke with it. I want you to go broke. I want you to take that money and I want you to get rid of it. Jared's in the studio with me right now as I shoot this content. Jared's 31 years, 32 years old. 32 years old. When you don't have money and you don't have credit, you got to knock on a door if you're committed. When you got a cushion, people go soft with cushions. And the problem is when there's a cushion of money sitting around, I promise you, when there's a cushion of money, you are going to find an emergency where that money will go to.
